title: rubus × demandtii
intro: Rubus × demandtii, also known as Demandt's Raspberry or Black Raspberry, is a hybrid of the red raspberry and the black raspberry, characterized by its dark-colored fruit and thorny canes. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × demandtii are said to include improving cardiovascular health, boosting the immune system, and potentially reducing the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
